positive: Minimalist circular crest illustration featuring a stylized, geometric forest scene. The design incorporates clean silhouettes of pine trees, crescent moons, and abstract woodland animals like foxes and deer. The style is a combination of linocut print and modern botanical etching, rendered with strong, flat black ink lines against a crisp white background. The composition is perfectly centered and suitable for embroidery or screen printing on apparel. Use negative space effectively to define shapes, achieving high contrast and clean edges. Color direction is strictly monochrome (black and white only). Vector art aesthetic, perfect symmetry, high detail, commercial quality.
